title: Grammatikalisierung im Slavischen
further_info: Recommended Reading BISANG, W.; HIMMELMANN, N.; WIEMER, B. (2004): What makes grammaticalization: a look from its fringes and its components. Berlin [et al.]: Mouton de Gruyter. HOPPER, P.J.; TRAUGOTT, E.C. (2003): Grammaticalization. Second Edition. Cambridge: Cambridge University Press. KUTEVA, T., HEINE, B. [et al.] (2019): World lexicon of grammaticalization. 2nd ed. New York [et al.]: Cambridge University Press. MEILLET, A. (1912): L’évolution des formes grammaticales. In: Linguistique historique et linguistique générale. Paris. 130-48. (2nd ed. 1921). NARROG, H.; HEINE, B. [ed.] (2018): Grammaticalization from a typological perspective. Oxford: Oxford University Press. PAGLIUCA, W. [ed.] (1994): Perspectives on grammaticalization. Amsterdam/Philadelphia: John Benjamins. WIEMER, B. (2020): Grammaticalization in Slavic. In: Bisang, W.; Mal’čukov, A.L. (eds.): Grammaticalization Scenarios. Cross-linguistic Variation and Universal Tendencies. Berlin; Boston: De Gruyter Mouton, 249-307.
